ValidationRule.description: Prevent users from changing Email Opt Out checkbox to false, unless user with System Administrator profile or FL CRMi Admin profile is doing the change.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'FL CRMi Admin', ISCHANGED(All_Emails_Opt_Out__c), All_Emails_Opt_Out__c = FALSE, NOT(ISBLANK(Email)), EDI_ByPassValidation__c = FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Email Opt Out cannot be unchecked manually.
